arts.ttl: Every word Jacob Ramsey said about Rogers, Mings' leadership, McGinn & Celtic clash
arts.sum: He has just come back from injury and after he got injured he was devastated because he wants to play in this Celtic game. "It was good to get that feeling again because I haven’t scored at Villa Park for a while.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist shares what he won't be doing when Celtic play Aston Villa and makes Bhoys confession
arts.sum: Ally McCoist shares if he will be wearing his Aston Villa shirt vs Celtic in Champions League Looking ahead to the big game, McCoist was asked who he will be supporting with Jeff Stelling cheekily asking which shirt he will be wearing when Celtic takes on Aston Villa .

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran transfer: Aston Villa anger, huge new offer, Unai Emery's demand
arts.sum: Jhon Duran has generated plenty of interest and more suitors are stepping forward hoping to test Aston Villa's resolve with less than a week to go until the January transfer window slams shut

arts.ttl: Aston Villa in talks with Chelsea over double deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa are in talks with Chelsea over a double deal to sign Axel Disasi and Joao Felix before the transfer deadline. Unai Emery wants to bring in a centre-back this month and is targeting a deal for Disasi. The France international has struggled for favour at Chelsea this season and has started just four […] The post Aston Villa in talks with Chelsea over double deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI as Brendan Rodgers seriously short on strikers and has Carter Vickers hole to fill
arts.sum: The league phase of the revamp comes to an end tonight and what a way to finish with a Battle of Britain

arts.ttl: Aston Villa pull back with offer – Quickly moving to other targets
arts.sum: On Tuesday, the media local to Villarreal first reported Juan Foyth was out of training because he awaiting news on a move to Aston Villa, and then reported it was related to an injury. Wednesday’s edition of El Periódico Mediterráneo reports it was actually down to both, stating it was due to ‘physical problems and The post Aston Villa pull back with offer – Quickly moving to other targets appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: History on Celtic’s side? Brendan Rodgers’ Aston Villa record sparks confidence
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers brings a history of success against the Birmingham-based side that could inspire confidence among the Hoops supporters.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Aston Villa: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Aston Villa vs Celtic kick-off time Aston Villa vs Celtic will be broadcast live on TV.

arts.ttl: What John McGinn said about drawing his boyhood club Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has the chance to claim a seeded playoff place with a positive result at Villa Park but the Bhoys could also secure a Champions League top-eight finish if results in other games go Rodgers’ way. The draw created excitement with Celtic to face English opposition once again in Europe, but what did McGinn and his Villa teammates think of drawing his boyhood club in the Champions League when both teams were pulled out together?

arts.ttl: Podcast: Champions League preview before Aston Villa v Celtic
arts.sum: We preview Celtic’s visit to Aston Villa in the Champions League.
